overall.description: First-person perspective walking through a dark forest at night in a survival-horror style video game. The player holds a flashlight that illuminates trees, grass, and a large rock formation while moving cautiously through the terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark forest trail with pine trees

events.description: flashlight arm moves out of the frame as camera shifts slightly right

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously through the dark forest holding a flashlight to illuminate the path

entered.detail: character's arm holding a flashlight visible in the lower left corner
tall pine trees surrounding the path on both sides
forest floor covered with dirt, leaves, and pine needles

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking through a dark forest at night. The character's arm holding a flashlight is visible in the lower left, illuminating the dirt path and surrounding pine trees. The flashlight arm moves out of frame around the 2-second mark as the camera continues forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest interior with large rock outcropping

events.description: large rock formation becomes visible ahead in the flashlight beam
camera passes the large rock formation on the left side

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk forward through the forest, approaching and passing a large rock

entered.detail: large boulder or rock outcropping on the forest floor

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking deeper into the forest where a large rock formation comes into view around 6 seconds. The flashlight illuminates the rock as the camera approaches and passes it on the left side. The ground shows more grass patches mixed with the dirt trail as the walk continues.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a dark, oppressive forest that gradually reveals a rugged rock formation. It begins by advancing along a dirt path, with a flashlight held in the lower left illuminating the surrounding pine trees before the arm slips out of frame. As the camera pushes deeper into the woods, the narrow trail expands to include patches of grass mixed with the soil. The scene then shifts as a large rock formation emerges from the darkness, becoming the central focus of the flashlight's beam. Finally, the camera glides past the left side of the stone structure, continuing its cautious journey further into the night.
